This '''[[Queen Mother]]''' ruled the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] around [[3100 BBY]], and was responsible for sealing its borders to the outside [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], a situation that would last until [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
